SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.punishment.util

Interface PlayerResolver

All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultPlayerResolver
@Deprecated(since="1.2.0", forRemoval=true) @ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion="1.3.0") public interface PlayerResolver
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
This interface's functionality will be superseded by the new NecrifyUser.
An interface used to retrieve player names und uuids used for storing them in a database. To retrieve a player's uuid, for example, there are three different ways:
1.: getPlayerUuid(String): returns the uuid of the player via Optional or Optional.empty() if this player is not online/cached/etc.
2.: queryPlayerUuid(String, Executor) queries the player uuid via the mojang api or some internal methods.
3.: getOrQueryPlayerName(UUID, Executor): a combination of the first two possibilities. If the Optional returned by getPlayerUuid(String) was empty, getOrQueryPlayerUuid(String, Executor) is called. The result of this operation will be returned.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<String>
    getOrQueryPlayerName(@NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull Executor executor)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    At first, getPlayerName(UUID) is invoked.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    At first, getPlayerUuid(String) is invoked.
    Optional<String>
    getPlayerName(@NotNull UUID uuid)
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Retrieves the player's name via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(UUID) (on Velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Retrieves the player's uuid via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(String) (on velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Queries the player's uuid, for example through the Mojang API

  • Method Details

    • getPlayerName

      Optional<String> getPlayerName(@NotNull @NotNull UUID uuid)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Retrieves the player's name via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(UUID) (on Velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the uuid of the player
      Returns:
      the name, or Optional.empty()

    • queryPlayerName

      CompletableFuture<String> queryPlayerName(@NotNull @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull @NotNull Executor executor)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Queries the player's name, for example through the Mojang API
      Parameters:
      uuid - the uuid of the player
      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's name or null, if not found.

    • getOrQueryPlayerName

      CompletableFuture<String> getOrQueryPlayerName(@NotNull @NotNull UUID uuid, @NotNull @NotNull Executor executor)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      At first, getPlayerName(UUID) is invoked. If the result is empty, the result of queryPlayerName(UUID, Executor) will be returned.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the uuid of the player
      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's name or null, if not found.

    • getPlayerUuid

      Optional<UUID> getPlayerUuid(@NotNull @NotNull String name)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Retrieves the player's uuid via com.velocitypowered.api.proxy.ProxyServer#getPlayer(String) (on velocity), a caching mechanism or related things.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the player
      Returns:
      the name, or Optional.empty()

      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Queries the player's uuid, for example through the Mojang API
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the player
      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's uuid or null, if not found.

      At first, getPlayerUuid(String) is invoked. If the result is empty, the result of queryPlayerUuid(String, Executor) will be returned.
      Parameters:

      executor - an executor to compute async operations
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture being completed with the player's name or null, if not found.
